prompt: A clean anime-style full-body character illustration of a young woman squatting low on a plain light gray background, centered in frame, with a soft studio shadow beneath her. She has {argument name="hair color" default="dark brown"} short bob hair with blunt straight bangs, slightly tousled ends, and a few loose strands around the face. Her expression is {argument name="expression" default="spiral half-lidded annoyed eyes"}, giving a tired, gloomy, slightly irritated look. She is wearing 4 visible clothing items: an oversized light gray hoodie with drawstrings and ribbed cuffs, dark blue denim short shorts with frayed hems, white scrunched ankle socks, and black low-top skate sneakers with white side stripes, white laces, and white soles. Her pose is a compact crouch with both knees up, one elbow resting on a knee, one hand partly covering the lower face or cheek, and the other hand hanging down near the front shoe. The art style is polished modern manga/anime key visual art with thin clean linework, smooth cel-shaded rendering, subtle fabric folds, natural skin highlights on the legs, and slightly oversized hoodie proportions. Emphasize a casual, moody, introverted vibe, minimalist composition, and a high-quality character-focused illustration.
translatedPrompt: 一张简洁的动漫风格全身角色插画，描绘了一位蹲在浅灰色纯色背景中央的年轻女性，脚下带有柔和的摄影棚阴影。她留着 {argument name="hair color" default="深棕色"} 的短波波头，带有整齐的平刘海，发梢略显凌乱，脸颊旁有几缕碎发。她的表情为 {argument name="expression" default="半睁的螺旋眼，带着一丝烦躁"}，呈现出疲惫、忧郁且略显恼火的神态。她穿着 4 件可见的单品：一件带有抽绳和罗纹袖口的大码浅灰色连帽衫、深蓝色毛边牛仔短裤、白色堆堆袜，以及带有白色侧条纹、白色鞋带和白色鞋底的黑色低帮滑板鞋。她的姿势是紧凑的蹲姿，双膝抬起，一只手肘靠在膝盖上，一只手半遮住下脸或脸颊，另一只手垂在前方鞋子附近。艺术风格为精致的现代漫画/动漫主视觉图，线条简洁流畅，采用平滑的赛璐珞渲染，布料褶皱细腻，腿部带有自然的皮肤高光，连帽衫比例略显宽大。强调休闲、忧郁、内向的氛围，构图极简，呈现高质量的角色聚焦插画。

breakdown.creativeCore: 身穿大码连帽衫蹲姿的动漫少女：此提示词可生成一张简洁的全身动漫角色插画，描绘了一位忧郁的街头风少女，适用于角色设计、社交媒体头像或漫画风格的插画创作。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: centered, full-body]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime, manga, minimalist, studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
[是否含文字/精确文字/可读性要求]。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
